author: y4rr
content:

- #930 ConvNeXt-Tiny (Sprint V.1 / B.5.b): closed — 5 conformance tests pass
- #931 EfficientNet-B0 (Sprint V.1 / B.5.b): closed — 5 conformance tests pass
- #932 MobileNetV2+V3-Small (Sprint V.2 / B.5.b): closed — 10 conformance tests pass
- #933 SwinTransformer-Tiny (Sprint V.2 / B.5.b): closed — 5 conformance tests pass
- #934 ViT-B/16 (Sprint V.3): closed — 5 fixture-backed conformance tests pass

All 25 architecture conformance tests confirmed passing in conformance_vision_models.rs. Umbrella is complete.
